direction_rows.reason: 000738 still wins the composite ranking on most overlap dates and has a clear expected-upside edge.
600118 flips the authority/support ordering on too many dates for a replay unlock from a two-name seed alone.
The next lawful move is to expand locally around the dual core and relearn authority/support under a wider BK0480-native surface.
The instability must be solved with BK0480-native evidence, not borrowed confirmation or mirror layers.

interpretation: V1.29X freezes the BK0480 dual-core seed as a valid kickoff surface but not a replay-ready one.
The board now needs local universe expansion rather than borrowed confirmation layers or premature replay tuning.
